name: Red Lentil Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the dried red lentils and water. Mix well.
3. Add the rolled oats, egg replacer, and additional water to the lentil mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Incorporate the cooked brown rice, grated carrots, tamari, scallions, garlic, and sage into the mixture. Combine thoroughly.
5. Transfer the mixture to a greased loaf pan and spread evenly.
6. Place the pan in the oven and bake for 30-35 minutes or until the loaf is set and lightly golden on top.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
